subcodes.first_line: Say: All praise be unto Thee, O my God, for having manifested through my name the pearls of utterance from the shell of the ocean of Thy mercy, and for having made mention of me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا الهی بما اظهرت باسمی لئالی البیان من صدف بحر رحمتک و ذکرتنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
